pageblock.hpp
Go to the documentation of this file.
1#pragma once
2
3#include <cstddef>
4#include <cstdint>
5#include <sys/mman.h>
6
7#include <build.hpp>
8
9namespace platform {
10 const size_t PAGEBLOCK_SIZE = 1024 * 1024;
11
12 // Map region of arbitrary size
13 static void* allocate_region(size_t region) {
14 void* ptr = mmap(nullptr, region, PROT_READ | PROT_WRITE, MAP_PRIVATE | MAP_ANONYMOUS, -1, 0);
15 ECS_ASSERT(ptr != MAP_FAILED, "Failed to allocate {} byte region.", region);
16 madvise(ptr, region, MADV_NOHUGEPAGE);
17 return ptr;
18 }
19
20 static void unallocate_region(void* ptr, size_t region) {
21 munmap(ptr, region);
22 }
23
24 // Page aligned block tied to a core local bump allocator.
25 // A pageblock is defined by meta region defining activity and a data region holding SoA arrays.
26 struct alignas(64) PageBlock {
27 PageBlock()
28 : m_base(reinterpret_cast<uint8_t*>(allocate_region(PAGEBLOCK_SIZE))) {}
29
30 ~PageBlock() {
31 if (m_base)
32 unallocate_region(m_base, PAGEBLOCK_SIZE);
33 }
34
35 // Move constructor
36 PageBlock(PageBlock&& other) noexcept
37 : m_base(other.m_base),
38 m_waterline(other.m_waterline),
39 m_count(other.m_count) {
40 other.m_base = nullptr;
41 }
42
43 // Move assignment
44 PageBlock& operator=(PageBlock&& other) noexcept {
45 if (this != &other) {
46 if (m_base)
47 unallocate_region(m_base, PAGEBLOCK_SIZE);
48
49 m_base = other.m_base;
50 m_waterline = other.m_waterline;
51 m_count = other.m_count;
52
53 other.m_base = nullptr;
54 }
55 return *this;
56 }
57
58 // Disable copying (important!)
59 PageBlock(const PageBlock&) = delete;
60 PageBlock& operator=(const PageBlock&) = delete;
61
62 uint8_t* m_base = nullptr;
63 size_t m_waterline = 0;
64 size_t m_count = 0;
65 };
66}
67
